drl:
rule "R0"
when
    $p0_0 : T0(f2 == false, $b0_0_0 : f2, $b0_0_1 : f0, f2 == false)
then
    insert(new T1($b0_0_1, $p0_0.getF0(), true));
    insertLogical(new T2($p0_0.isF2(), $b0_0_1, $b0_0_0));
    modify($p0_0) { setF2(true) }
end
rule "R1"
salience -7
no-loop
when
    accumulate( T2(f1 < 2.0, f2 == true, !(f0 == true || f2 == false), $s1_0 : f1); $a1_0 : average($s1_0) )
then
end
rule "R2"
when
    $p2_0 : T1(f2 != true, f1 >= 8, $b2_0_0 : f1, $b2_0_1 : f1)
then
    insert(new T2($p2_0.isF2(), 1, $p2_0.isF2()));
end
rule "R3"
salience 1
when
    T2()
    T0()
then
end
rule "R4"
when
    T0(f0 > 4, f0 != -1, $b4_0_0 : f1, $b4_0_1 : f1)
    $p4_1 : T0(f2 != false, f1 == 1, f1 < 3 || f1 in (-3.0, 2.0))
then
    delete($p4_1);
end
rule "R5"
no-loop
when
    T2(f1 > 9, f0 != true, $b5_0_0 : f1)
    not T2()
then
end
